preconditions: session contains database or MCP tool execution
strategy: Track which tables are queried most frequently
Record cost thresholds and dry-run habits
Note preferred data sources and query patterns
Capture common WHERE filters and date range patterns

preconditions: user corrected analysis approach or methodology
strategy: Record the correction: what was wrong and what is correct
Update analysis principles (base definition, metric logic)
Track which mistakes recur to prioritize reminders

preconditions: enough tool usage data to detect patterns
strategy: Count tool frequency per project type
Detect common tool sequences (e.g., Read -> Edit -> Bash)
Note when user prefers one tool over another

preconditions: user gave feedback on output format or communication style
strategy: Track language switching patterns (zh-TW vs en)
Record format preferences (bullet points, no headers, etc.)
Note writing style rules (no em dashes, conversational tone)
Capture confirmed vs rejected output approaches
